name: supreSSHion
description: macOS menubar agent that listens for screen lock and sleep events and unloads SSH keys from memory.

name: bluld
description: A small Linux daemon using the user-space LED driver to expose Blinkstick LEDs via /sys/class/leds.

name: mac-zoom-status-mqtt
description: Watches the active Zoom meeting process on a Mac and publishes meeting status to MQTT for home automation use.

name: openhab-stuff
description: openHAB configurations, rules, and HOWTOs for my home automation setup.

name: tivo2podcast
description: (Archived) pipeline scripts to download shows from my TiVo, transcode them, and put them in a podcast feed for easy downloading (for personal use only.)
